data.title: Global fashion brand GUESS marks 45th anniversary with conference in Marrakesh. Symbolizes unity and culture.
data.description: In preparation for its 45th anniversary in 2026, GUESS has selected Marrakesh as the venue for its international conference, One World, One Brand. Marrakesh, known for its cultural heritage, will host this milestone event as the brand celebrates its journey.

data.title: Citrine Global Corp (OTCQB: CTGL) in Palm Beach, FL announces new era for SkyTech Orion Global Corp focusing on drone solutions for defense and civilian applications worldwide.
data.description: In Palm Beach, Florida, on October 24, 2025, it was announced that SkyTech Orion Global Corp. is entering a new phase focused on innovation and growth. The company aims to lead in unmanned systems and advanced drone solutions for defense and civilian use in the United States, Israel, and allied nations. This strategic vision marks a significant development for the company and its stakeholders.

data.title: Intrinsic Therapeutics revealed new CPT code 63032 for bone-anchored annular closure, effective January 1, 2026.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, Intrinsic Therapeutics, Inc. introduced a new Category I CPT® code, 63032, for bone-anchored annular closure as the American Medical Association (AMA) published it. This will be effective starting from January 1. Intrinsic Therapeutics, Inc. is the developer of the Barricaid® Annular Closure Device which is the driving force behind this development.

data.title: Craneware Group launches Trisus® SaaS solutions in Microsoft Azure for global customers to accelerate app development.
data.description: Now, customers of Microsoft Azure around the globe have the opportunity to utilize The Craneware Group's complete range of co-sell-ready Trisus® SaaS solutions. By leveraging the scalability, reliability, and agility of Azure, users can expedite application development and enhance their business strategies. This collaboration was announced in DEERFIELD BEACH, Fla. in October.

data.title: CobbleStone Software discusses AI in contract management in Business Reporter article on The Independent.
data.description: Princeton-based CobbleStone Software recently discussed their perspective on AI-driven contract management in a fresh article on Business Reporter, as seen on The Independent. The article, dated October 24, 2025, revealed CobbleStone Software's position as a top supplier of contract lifecycle management (CLM) solutions.

data.title: UtilityInnovation Group acquires infrastructure enterprise to enhance services, strengthen capabilities in North America.
data.description: In Raleigh, North Carolina, on October 24, 2025, UtilityInnovation Group (UIG) has successfully acquired an infrastructure delivery enterprise that bolsters its capacity to cater to utilities and crucial power users throughout North America. This acquisition significantly enhances UIG's...

data.title: Azumi partners with DIAFA for global expansion, joining Dogus Hospitality, marking a new era of growth.
data.description: In London on October 24, 2025, the renowned restaurant group linked to Zuma embarks on a new phase with Abu Dhabi's luxury hospitality company DIAFA, collaborating with current partner Doğuş Hospitality to propel global expansion. Azumi Ltd., which has garnered international acclaim, will be pioneering this endeavor.

data.title: Micropolis IPO at $4/share raises $15.5M, began trading on NYSE as "MCRP" on March 7, 2025, per financial results.
data.description: An initial public offering (IPO) was successfully conducted at $4.00 per share, generating $15.5 million in gross proceeds. The company began trading on the NYSE American on March 7, 2025, utilizing the ticker symbol "MCRP."

data.title: FieldFlo, a software provider for subcontractors, gets $35 million investment from Mainsail Partners in Denver.
data.description: Denver-based company FieldFlo, which specializes in project and safety management software for specialty subcontractors, has recently announced a significant financial development. Mainsail Partners has invested a substantial $35 million into FieldFlo. This investment is expected to fuel the company's growth and expansion within the industry.

data.title: Fitch upgrades TITAN Group outlook to Positive, maintains ‘BB+’ IDR rating, citing improved financial profile with growing profitability and lower leverage.
data.description: Fitch Ratings has upgraded TITAN Group’s outlook to Positive from Stable, maintaining its Long-Term Issuer Default Rating (IDR) at ‘BB+’. This shift indicates increased confidence in TITAN’s financial stability, driven by rising profitability, reduced leverage, and prudent capital management practices. Fitch's report emphasizes enhanced earnings and strong cash flow generation, bolstering the company's financial position. The revisions come as TITAN continues to show positive growth within its operations.

data.title: High-net-worth households are evaluating and shifting spending on professional services, revealing changing trends. Key findings show that 40% may switch CPAs due to high expectations, over half have trust and estate attorneys, and only one-third use wealth managers.
data.description: A 2025 study by Long Angle, a community of 6,000+ high-net-worth individuals, reveals shifting trends in how affluent families engage professional services. While CPAs and housekeepers are still prevalent, there is rising interest in services catering to health and family outcomes. The study notes that 82% of respondents rely on CPAs, but 40% are considering changing providers due to higher expectations of responsiveness and guidance. Half of wealthy households work with trust and estate attorneys, with usage increasing with wealth complexity. Wealth manager adoption is low, with only one-third using such services, suggesting a hands-on investment approach among younger, savvy households. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Ortho Molecular Products partners with Calocurb® to launch Calocurb® CLINICAL, an appetite management solution, exclusive to licensed practitioners.
data.description: In Barrington, Illinois, on October 24, 2025, Ortho Molecular Products, a prominent nutraceutical manufacturer catering solely to licensed healthcare practitioners, announced a partnership with Calocurb® based in New Zealand. This collaboration aims to introduce Calocurb® CLINICAL to the professional market. The partnership seeks to leverage Ortho Molecular Products' reach and expertise in the industry to bring Calocurb® CLINICAL offering to a wider audience of healthcare professionals.

data.title: Happinest Brands sees major growth with 24 new territories awarded in Q3 2025, enhancing franchisee support.
data.description: In the third quarter of this year, Happinest Brands, a multi-brand franchisor for home services, granted 24 new territories. The company based in Holmdel, New Jersey, also achieved significant brand milestones and introduced improved support systems for franchisees. This national franchisor, offering services across multiple brands, continues to expand its reach and enhance its operations.

data.title: BAM Capital purchases Hayden Flats, a high-end complex in Bloomington, Indiana, built in 2023.
data.description: An Indianapolis-based multifamily syndication company, BAM Capital, recently announced the successful acquisition of Hayden Flats, a high-quality apartment complex built in 2023, located in Bloomington, Indiana. This strategic acquisition marks a significant milestone for the company in expanding its portfolio within the region.

data.title: Bybit showcases Bybit Card to 45,000 festivalgoers at Tomorrowland Brasil 2025, 2nd largest crypto exchange.
data.description: At the "Portal to the Future" stage in Dubai, UAE, on October 24, 2025, Bybit Card showcased real-world crypto utility to 45,000 festival attendees. Bybit, the second-largest cryptocurrency exchange globally in terms of trading volume, introduced the future of finance at Tomorrowland Brasil 2025, illustrating the increasing integration of cryptocurrencies into everyday transactions.

data.title: NYSE provides pre-market update on Oct 24, 2025. Kristen Scholer delivers insights from NYSE Trading Floor. Grayscale celebrates Multi Asset Crypto Fund GDLC.
data.description: On October 24, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) issued a daily pre-market update from the NYSE Trading Floor. Investors can access the NYSE Pre-market update for valuable market insights prior to the commencement of trading. Kristen Scholer presented the pre-market update on October 24, providing crucial information for investors. This update aims to assist traders in making informed decisions, leveraging the data shared directly from the NYSE Trading Floor. Stay informed with the latest market trends and analysis before engaging in trading activities each day.
